mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = F.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_STATE = '승인'
AND NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
